title: A Consistent Implementation of Cluster Strong Lensing in Cosmological Simulation Light Cones
comment: 18 pages, 10 Figures, submitted to OJA, comments welcome
summary: Galaxy cluster strong gravitational lensing plays a central role in precision cosmology, yet robust theoretical predictions have lagged behind an abundance of high-quality strong lensing observations. This shortfall reflects both a mismatch between the geometry of the strong-lensing problem and standard cubic simulation boxes, and the fundamental tension between simulation volume and resolution. Consequently, many current forecasts adopt hybrid approaches that extract individual lenses from simulations and combine them with analytic or observed source populations positioned near caustics. These methods often omit correlated and/or uncorrelated line-of-sight (LoS) structure, or include it in ways that do not preserve correlations across redshift. Here we present a fully simulation-based procedure that generates strong-lensing images directly from particle data, drawing the lens, source, and all intervening resolved objects self-consistently from the simulated large-scale structure. Our approach combines a structure-preserving remapping of the simulation volume into a lensing-appropriate geometry with multi-plane ray tracing, enabling the use of uniform simulation boxes that resolve both cluster-scale primary lenses and high-redshift source galaxies. We demonstrate the method by generating example light cones and images using IllustrisTNG data, then use these results to conservatively quantify the impact of LoS structure on image configurations and critical-curve morphology. We find that uncorrelated LoS structure can shift the relative positions of lensed images by several arcseconds, introduces a $\sim 6\%$ scatter in the area of a cluster's primary critical curve, and changes the total critical area within 100$^{\prime\prime}$ of the cluster potential minimum by $16^{+20\%}_{-14\%}$ at a source plane redshift of $z_s=4$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全基于模拟的星系团强引力透镜成像生成方法，从粒子数据直接生成图像，自洽地包含了透镜、源和所有视线方向的 resolved 结构，并利用 IllustrisTNG 数据展示了视线方向结构对透镜图像位置和临界曲线形态的显著影响。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟方法难以兼顾体积和分辨率，且常忽略或处理不当视线方向结构，导致理论预测落后于高质量观测数据。
AI.method: 将模拟体积进行结构保持的几何重映射，结合多平面射线追踪，从粒子数据直接生成强引力透镜图像，自洽包含透镜、源及所有 intervening 结构。
AI.result: 不相关的视线方向结构可使透镜图像相对位置偏移数角秒，引起主临界曲线面积约6%的散射，并在源红移zs=4时使总临界面积变化16^{+20%}_{-14%}。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能更真实地模拟强引力透镜效应，视线方向结构的影响不可忽略，对精确宇宙学具有重要意义。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于星系团强引力透镜的模拟方法，与用户的主要研究领域（强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜）高度相关。论文提出的方法直接处理强透镜成像，并量化了视线方向结构的影响，这与用户对透镜效应和宇宙正午星系研究的兴趣一致。虽然论文主题是星系团透镜而非星系-星系透镜，但方法学和科学问题（如临界曲线形态、源平面红移）与用户的核心兴趣紧密相连。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为星系团强引力透镜，属于用户核心兴趣领域。用户画像中'透镜'、'引力透镜'等关键词权重很高，且论文涉及高红移源（zs=4），与用户对高红移星系动力学和宇宙正午的研究兴趣相符。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文采用多平面射线追踪和模拟体积重映射方法生成强透镜图像，这与用户研究中常用的强透镜建模和模拟技术高度一致。用户画像中多次出现'模拟'、'透镜'相关关键词，表明方法学上的强匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者包括Mark Vogelsberger，该作者出现在用户的核心作者列表中，权重较高。其他作者如Simon Birrer、Massimo Meneghetti等也是引力透镜领域的知名学者，与用户的研究网络有重叠。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文提出了一种完全基于模拟的强透镜成像生成方法，自洽地包含了视线方向结构，这在现有研究中较为新颖。用户对高红移星系和透镜效应的研究兴趣使得这种新方法具有较高的参考价值。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主要关注星系团透镜，而非用户特别强调的星系-星系强透镜。此外，论文侧重于模拟方法而非具体的观测或动力学分析，与用户对高红移星系动力学和气体研究的直接关联稍弱。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团强引力透镜在精密宇宙学中扮演核心角色，然而稳健的理论预测却落后于大量高质量强引力透镜观测。这一不足既反映了强引力透镜问题几何结构与标准立方体模拟盒子之间的不匹配，也体现了模拟体积与分辨率之间的根本矛盾。因此，许多当前的预测采用混合方法，从模拟中提取单个透镜，并将其与解析或观测到的、位于近焦散线处的源种群相结合。这些方法常常忽略相关和/或不相关的视线方向结构，或者以不保留红移间相关性的方式将其包含在内。本文提出了一种完全基于模拟的流程，直接从粒子数据生成强引力透镜图像，自洽地从模拟的大尺度结构中提取透镜、源以及所有中间已解析的天体。我们的方法将保结构的模拟体积重映射为适合透镜的几何形状，并结合多平面光线追踪，从而能够使用同时解析星系团级主透镜和高红移源星系的均匀模拟盒子。我们利用IllustrisTNG数据生成示例光锥和图像来演示该方法，然后使用这些结果保守地量化视线方向结构对图像构型和临界曲线形态的影响。我们发现，不相关的视线方向结构可以使透镜图像的相对位置偏移数角秒，导致星系团主临界曲线面积产生约6%的弥散，并在源平面红移z_s=4时，使星系团势能最小值100角秒内的总临界面积变化16^{+20%}_{-14%}。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，所提方法能更真实地模拟强引力透镜效应，视线方向结构的影响不可忽略，对精确宇宙学具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic of the procedure by which many snapshots of a cosmological simulation run in a cubic box can be combined into a multi-plane strong lensing image. One source and one lens plane are created per simulation snapshot (i.e. redshift), and then the light from each source plane at redshift \(z_{s}\) is ray traced through all lens planes with redshift \(z_{l}\) such that \(z_{l}<z_{s}\) . The example plane shown in the diagram is at a higher redshift than the primary lens group at \(z_{G}\) , but the planes at \(z<z_{G}\) are also ray traced in this pipeline. The resulting lensed image is then the sum of all lensed source planes. Observational effects can then be modeled and applied to the result for various instrument specifications. The simulation data shown in this example is a portion of the TNG50 box.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：将立方体盒子中运行的宇宙学模拟的多个快照组合成多平面强引力透镜图像的流程示意图。每个模拟快照（即每个红移）创建一个源平面和一个透镜平面，然后红移为\(z_{s}\)的每个源平面的光线被追踪通过所有红移\(z_{l}\)满足\(z_{l}<z_{s}\)的透镜平面。图中所示的示例平面红移高于主透镜群的红移\(z_{G}\)，但红移\(z<z_{G}\)的平面也在此流程中被光线追踪。最终的透镜图像是所有透镜化源平面的总和。然后可以针对各种仪器规格对观测效应进行建模并应用于结果。此示例中显示的模拟数据是TNG50盒子的一部分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A flowchart of the computation required for a single lensed image prediction using a group \(G\) from a cosmological simulation as the primary lens at a desired redshift \(z_{G}\) . Note that lens plane \(i\) is not used in the computation of lensed result \(i\) and this arrow is included only to direct visuals.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用来自宇宙学模拟的群\(G\)作为所需红移\(z_{G}\)处的主透镜，进行单次透镜图像预测所需计算的流程图。注意，透镜平面\(i\)不用于计算透镜化结果\(i\)，此箭头仅用于引导视觉。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: An illustrative example of the outputs of the lensing pipeline. (Top Row) The surface brightness maps of 3 example planes in the light cone without lensing that surface brightness through the mass planes at lower redshifts. (Bottom Row) How each plane looks after ray tracing the maps through all lens planes at lower redshifts. Also marked is the position of any source in the unlensed panels which is multiply imaged in the lensed panels, with each image location shown in the same color and with an alphanumeric label. Some of these multiple images are very close together and may not be visually distinguishable. On the right are the sum of surface brightnesses for all planes both unlensed and lensed, with the same multiply imaged sources marked, and the brightness of the two example planes at \(z=2.00\) and \(z=2.44\) enhanced by a factor of 100 for visualization in this example. Note that there exist other multiple images in the summed lensed panel which are not marked here. The lowest redshift shown is the cluster redshift, but lower redshift planes were included in the ray tracing and the sum in both rows.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：透镜流程输出的一个说明性示例。（顶行）光锥中3个示例平面在未透镜化情况下的表面亮度图，这些表面亮度通过较低红移的质量平面。（底行）每个平面在通过所有较低红移透镜平面进行光线追踪后的外观。同时标出了未透镜化面板中任何在透镜化面板中被多重成像的源的位置，每个像的位置以相同颜色和字母数字标签显示。其中一些多重像非常接近，可能无法在视觉上区分。右侧是所有平面未透镜化和透镜化后的表面亮度总和，标出了相同的多重成像源，并且为了在此示例中可视化，将红移\(z=2.00\)和\(z=2.44\)的两个示例平面的亮度增强了100倍。注意，在求和后的透镜化面板中还存在其他未在此标记的多重像。显示的最低红移是星系团红移，但较低红移的平面已包含在光线追踪以及两行的求和中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: A grid of lensing quantities for light cones utilizing the first 4 groups in the group catalog of TNG300-1 at \(z_{G}=0.38\) as primary lenses in the strong lensing pipeline described in this paper. The columns are (1) surface brightness in \({erg\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,Hz^{-1}}\) for the whole lensed light cone of each group, computed in the JWST f200w filter but without observational effects, (2) the lensing convergence map \(\kappa\) for \(z_{s}=4\) , (3) the magnitude of the magnification map \(|\mu|\) for \(z_{s}=4\) , and (4) the shear strength \(\gamma\) for \(z_{s}=4\) . In column (1) we annotate the group mass \(M_{200m}\) for the primary lens at \(z_{G}\) , and in column (2) we show the critical curves for \(z_{s}=4\) in dark blue.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：利用本文所述强引力透镜流程中TNG300-1在\(z_{G}=0.38\)处群目录的前4个群作为主透镜的光锥透镜量网格。各列分别为（1）每个群整个透镜化光锥的表面亮度，单位为\({erg\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,Hz^{-1}}\)，在JWST f200w滤光片中计算但未考虑观测效应，（2）\(z_{s}=4\)的透镜会聚图\(\kappa\)，（3）\(z_{s}=4\)的放大率图绝对值\(|\mu|\)，以及（4）\(z_{s}=4\)的剪切强度\(\gamma\)。在第（1）列中，我们标注了主透镜在\(z_{G}\)处的群质量\(M_{200m}\)，在第（2）列中，我们以深蓝色显示了\(z_{s}=4\)的临界曲线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The effective radius of the primary critical curve vs mass for light cones centered on all groups (clusters) above \(M_{200m}=5\times 10^{14}\,{M_{\odot}}\) in the TNG300-1 group catalog at \(z_{G}=0.38\) . The source plane redshift is chosen to be \(z_{s}=2\) . We also show the effective radii of the lens models of HST observations presented in Sharon et al. ( 2020 ) which describe clusters at various redshifts, each with \(z_{s}=2\) . In pink and black respectively are the simulation results of Robertson et al. ( 2020 ) and a curve demonstrating the effective radius of an isolated NFW halo with concentration fixed by a mass-concentration relation (see text), both with lens and source plane redshifts matching \(z_{G}\) and \(z_{s}\) for the TNG data.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：TNG300-1群目录中\(z_{G}=0.38\)处所有质量\(M_{200m}=5\times 10^{14}\,{M_{\odot}}\)以上的群（星系团）的光锥中心主临界曲线有效半径与质量的关系。源平面红移选为\(z_{s}=2\)。我们还展示了Sharon等人（2020）提出的HST观测透镜模型的有效半径，这些模型描述了不同红移的星系团，每个都取\(z_{s}=2\)。粉色和黑色分别表示Robertson等人（2020）的模拟结果以及一条展示孤立NFW晕有效半径的曲线，该晕的浓度由质量-浓度关系固定（见正文），其透镜和源平面红移与TNG数据的\(z_{G}\)和\(z_{s}\)匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The lensed surface brightness in the JWST f200w band of the light cone corresponding to group 1 in the TNG300-1 group catalog at \(z_{G}=0.38\) . Overlaid are all multiply imaged sources in the light cone which contain at least 2 visually identifiable images, along with two large arcs which do not correspond to multiple images. Some multiple images, especially in the cluster core, are not visually distinguishable.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：TNG300-1群目录中\(z_{G}=0.38\)处群1对应光锥在JWST f200w波段的透镜化表面亮度。叠加显示的是光锥中所有包含至少2个视觉可识别像的多重成像源，以及两个不对应于多重像的大弧。一些多重像，尤其是在星系团核心区域，在视觉上无法区分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The lensed surface brightness in the JWST f200w band of the light cone corresponding to group 1 in the TNG300-1 group catalog at \(z_{G}=0.38\) , shown in the first panel by stacking the unlensed planes (marked as “No Lensing”). In the second panel, we perform ray tracing of the planes with \(z>z_{G}\) using the mass in the primary lens plane only, labelled “Primary Lens Plane Only”, and note that this includes both the primary lens cluster and correlated structure within \(\sim 35\,{Mpc}\) along the line of sight. We also show the critical curves for \(z_{s}=4\) in dark blue. In the third panel we show the result of lensing each source plane through all available lens planes at lower redshifts in the light cone (the default output of the pipeline described in this paper; labeled as “Full Light Cone”) and the corresponding critical curves. In the fourth panel, we show the difference between the surface brightness with and without LoS planes, with a diverging symmetric logarithmic colormap diverging from white at 0 difference.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：TNG300-1群目录中\(z_{G}=0.38\)处群1对应光锥在JWST f200w波段的透镜化表面亮度，第一个面板通过叠加未透镜化平面显示（标记为“No Lensing”）。在第二个面板中，我们仅使用主透镜平面中的质量对红移\(z>z_{G}\)的平面进行光线追踪，标记为“Primary Lens Plane Only”，并注意这包括主透镜星系团以及视线方向约\(35\,{Mpc}\)内的相关结构。我们还以深蓝色显示了\(z_{s}=4\)的临界曲线。在第三个面板中，我们展示了将每个源平面通过光锥中所有可用较低红移透镜平面进行透镜化的结果（本文所述流程的默认输出；标记为“Full Light Cone”）以及相应的临界曲线。在第四个面板中，我们展示了有无视线方向平面时表面亮度的差异，使用从白色（0差异）发散的对称对数色图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: ( Left Column ) The absolute magnitude of the magnification due to groups 1 and 2 in the TNG300-1 group catalog at \(z_{G}=0.38\) , including correlated structure within \(\sim 35\,{Mpc}\) along the line of sight. ( Right Column ) The absolute magnitude of the magnification in the light cone corresponding to groups 1 and 2 in the TNG300-1 group catalog at \(z_{G}=0.38\) , including all line of sight material. In all panels we choose \(z_{s}=4\) for the source plane, and note that the field of view is larger in the top row.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：（左列）TNG300-1群目录中\(z_{G}=0.38\)处群1和群2的放大率绝对值，包括视线方向约\(35\,{Mpc}\)内的相关结构。（右列）TNG300-1群目录中\(z_{G}=0.38\)处群1和群2对应光锥的放大率绝对值，包括所有视线方向物质。所有面板中我们选择源平面红移\(z_{s}=4\)，并注意顶行的视场更大。

title: Gravothermal Collapse: Robust Against Baryonic Feedback
summary: We perform a stress test of gravothermal collapse in self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) halos under baryonic feedback using a semi-analytical oscillating-potential model in controlled N-body simulations. For high-concentration halos, where the SIDM thermalization timescale is short, gravothermal collapse is only mildly delayed and never stalled, even under extremely strong feedback. In contrast, the collapse of a median-concentration halo can be significantly delayed, but it resumes once feedback ceases. The final density profile of such halos depends sensitively on the episodic feedback history, producing a broad diversity in central densities. These results strengthen the interpretation of dense compact perturbers identified in recent strong-lensing observations as core-collapsed SIDM halos.

AI.tldr: 通过半解析振荡势模型和N体模拟，研究了重子反馈对自相互作用暗物质(SIDM)晕引力热坍塌的影响。高浓度晕的坍塌仅轻微延迟，中等浓度晕的坍塌会被显著延迟但反馈停止后恢复，最终密度分布对反馈历史敏感，支持强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑扰动物是核坍缩SIDM晕的解释。
AI.motivation: 检验在重子反馈作用下SIDM晕的引力热坍塌是否会受到显著影响或被抑制，从而验证强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑物体是否可以被解释为核坍缩的SIDM晕。
AI.method: 采用半解析振荡势模型（模拟重子反馈的周期性扰动），结合受控N体数值模拟，对不同浓度（高浓度和中等浓度）的SIDM晕施加不同程度的反馈，观察其引力热坍塌行为。
AI.result: 高浓度晕的引力热坍塌几乎不受影响，仅轻微延迟；中等浓度晕的坍塌会被显著延迟，但反馈停止后坍塌过程会恢复；最终的密度分布对反馈的历息息相关，导致中心密度呈现多样性。
AI.conclusion: 重子反馈无法彻底阻止SIDM晕的引力热坍塌，特别是对于高浓度晕。强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑扰动物可以被解释为经历了核坍缩的SIDM晕，且其密度多样性可由不同的反馈历史解释。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接探讨自相互作用暗物质晕的引力热坍塌，并将其与强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑扰动物联系起来，这与用户Zotero资料中'strong gravitational lensing'、'dark matter'、'halo'等核心主题高度吻合。论文使用N体模拟方法，与用户资料中常见的数值模拟研究一致。虽然作者不在核心作者列表中，但论文主题与用户主要兴趣领域强相关，且结论直接支持强透镜观测解释，因此给予高分。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、暗物质晕）高度匹配，特别是将SIDM晕的核坍缩与强透镜观测中的致密物体联系起来，直接回应用户的核心研究问题。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文采用半解析模型和N体数值模拟，与用户资料中常见的数值模拟和观测数据分析方法一致，方法契合度高。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者（Demao Kong, Hai-Bo Yu）不在用户的核心作者列表中，但该领域与用户兴趣重叠，作者契合度一般。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文系统检验了重子反馈对SIDM晕引力热坍塌的影响，并解释了强透镜观测中致密物体的多样性，具有较高的新颖性和创新性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无负面因素。论文主题与用户兴趣高度一致，且未涉及用户不感兴趣的领域（如纯宇宙学、粒子物理等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们使用受控N体模拟中的半解析振荡势模型，对重子反馈下自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）晕的引力热坍塌进行了压力测试。对于高浓度晕，其中SIDM热化时间尺度较短，即使在极强反馈下，引力热坍塌也仅被轻微延迟，从未停滞。相比之下，中等浓度晕的坍塌可能被显著延迟，但一旦反馈停止，坍塌便会恢复。此类晕的最终密度分布敏感地依赖于间歇性反馈历史，从而产生中心密度的广泛多样性。这些结果加强了近期强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑扰动物被解释为核坍缩SIDM晕的解释。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，重子反馈无法彻底阻止SIDM晕的引力热坍塌，特别是对于高浓度晕。强透镜观测中发现的致密紧凑扰动物可以被解释为经历了核坍缩的SIDM晕，且其密度多样性可由不同的反馈历史解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Main : Evolution of the normalized inner densities within \(0.3\,{kpc}\) . The thick (thin) solid red curve represents the high- (median-) concentration halo with the strong feedback model, while the thick (thin) dashed orange curve represents the corresponding halo with the weak feedback model. Inset : Corresponding dark matter density profiles at \(t=4\,{Gyr}\) for the strong feedback model, where the halos are relaxed for \(1\,{Gyr}\) after the final feedback cycle. The thick (thin) dotted curve denotes the initial high- (median-) concentration halo.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：主图：\(0.3\,{kpc}\) 内归一化内部密度的演化。粗（细）实红线表示具有强反馈模型的高（中）浓度晕，而粗（细）橙色虚线表示具有弱反馈模型的相应晕。插图：强反馈模型在 \(t=4\,{Gyr}\) 时的相应暗物质密度分布，其中晕在最终反馈周期后弛豫了 \(1\,{Gyr}\)。粗（细）点线表示初始高（中）浓度晕。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left : Evolution of the averaged inner density within \(0.3\,{kpc}\) for the high-concentration halo under different feedback scenarios. The red and orange curves represent the strong (solid) and weak (dashed) feedback models, respectively, while the black curve denotes the SIDM-only simulation. Right : Dark matter density profiles. The solid red curve shows the core-collapsed SIDM halo with the strong feedback model, while the solid black curve denotes the SIDM-only simulation. The dashed black curve represents the initial NFW halo, and the dot-dashed purple curve shows the CDM halo evolved for \(2\,{Gyr}\) under the oscillating potential of the strong feedback model. The gray curve and shaded region represent the strong-lensing perturber model for the B1938+666 system from Ref. [ 93 ] (T25).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：不同反馈情景下高浓度晕在 \(0.3\,{kpc}\) 内的平均内部密度演化。红色和橙色曲线分别表示强（实线）和弱（虚线）反馈模型，而黑色曲线表示仅SIDM模拟。右图：暗物质密度分布。红色实线表示具有强反馈模型的核坍缩SIDM晕，而黑色实线表示仅SIDM模拟。黑色虚线表示初始NFW晕，紫色点划线表示在强反馈模型的振荡势下演化 \(2\,{Gyr}\) 的CDM晕。灰色曲线和阴影区域表示来自参考文献[93]（T25）的B1938+666系统的强透镜扰动物模型。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Central density evolution of the median-concentration halo for different feedback scenarios. The blue curve denotes the case in which feedback is active during \(0\textup{--}4\,{Gyr}\) and completely removed afterward. The navy curve denotes the case in which feedback is active during \(0\textup{--}4\,{Gyr}\) and subsequently replaced by a static baryonic potential with \(M=M_{max}\) for the remainder of the evolution. The teal curve represents the case in which feedback is active during \(8\textup{--}10\,{Gyr}\) . The black curve shows the SIDM-only case for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同反馈情景下中等浓度晕的中心密度演化。蓝色曲线表示反馈在 \(0\textup{--}4\,{Gyr}\) 期间活跃，之后完全移除的情况。海军蓝曲线表示反馈在 \(0\textup{--}4\,{Gyr}\) 期间活跃，随后在剩余演化中被具有 \(M=M_{max}\) 的静态重子势替代的情况。青色曲线表示反馈在 \(8\textup{--}10\,{Gyr}\) 期间活跃的情况。黑色曲线表示仅SIDM情况以供比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Thermalization timescale during gravothermal evolution for the high-concentration (top) and median-concentration (bottom) halos in the SIDM-only simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：仅SIDM模拟中高浓度（顶部）和中等浓度（底部）晕在引力热演化过程中的热化时间尺度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The corresponding density profiles at \(t=14\,{Gyr}\) for the simulated cases in Fig. 3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：图3中模拟情况在 \(t=14\,{Gyr}\) 时的相应密度分布。

title: Statistical imprints of wave-like dark matter on multiply-imaged galaxies in strong cluster lenses from JWST
summary: Wave-like dark matter ($ψ$DM) is an elusive dark matter (DM) candidate. The model, often also called fuzzy or ultralight DM, proposes that DM is an extremely light ($m\sim10^{-22}$ eV) boson and thereby has a kpc-scale de Broglie wavelength. Hence, interference of DM gives rise to sub-galactic density fluctuations that can be studied with strong gravitational lensing. In this paper, we use the residual power spectrum, $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$, as a probe of $ψ$DM, which quantifies deviations from smooth lensing predictions, measured from multiply-imaged galaxies in strong cluster lenses. The key idea is that imprinted in these deviations are lensing distortions from DM substructure, which can be harnessed statistically to distinguish among DM theories. We simulate JWST-quality mock observations of strong gravitational lensing in galaxy clusters, modeling line-of-sight DM substructure within $ψ$DM and the standard cold dark matter (CDM) paradigms. Using mock deep observations ($\sim$ 20 hours), we find that $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$ is sensitive to both $ψ$DM particle mass and fluctuation amplitude, and can distinguish $ψ$DM fluctuations from CDM subhalos. We demonstrate that $\mathrm{P}_δ(k)$ can be measured directly from data by modeling the smooth lensing with a local Curved Arc Basis formalism. With realistic modeling systematics, we find a statistically significant separation between $ψ$DM and CDM across $1 \lesssim k \lesssim 11\,\mathrm{kpc}^{-1}$ -- offering an independent probe of the wave-like nature of DM complementary to existing constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文利用强引力透镜中的残余功率谱Pδ(k)作为探针，通过模拟JWST级别的星系团强透镜观测，证明该方法能够有效区分波状暗物质(ψDM)和冷暗物质(CDM)的亚星系密度涨落，为研究暗物质波动性质提供了独立的新手段。
AI.motivation: 波状暗物质(ψDM)作为一种候选暗物质模型，其kpc尺度德布罗意波长的干涉效应会导致亚星系的密度涨落，但目前缺乏有效的观测手段来探测这种波动性质并区分不同暗物质模型。
AI.method: 利用多重成像星系强透镜中的残余功率谱Pδ(k)作为探针，模拟JWST质量的星系团强透镜观测，在ψDM和CDM两种范式下建模视线方向的暗物质亚结构，并使用局域Curved Arc Basis形式对平滑透镜进行建模。
AI.result: Pδ(k)对ψDM粒子质量和涨落振幅敏感，能够区分ψDM涨落与CDM亚结构。在1≲k≲11 kpc⁻¹范围内，ψDM和CDM之间存在统计显著的分离。
AI.conclusion: 残余功率谱Pδ(k)可以作为探测波状暗物质波动性质的有效独立探针，补充现有约束。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为强引力透镜，与用户Zotero画像中的'lens'、'lensing'、'dark matter'等关键词匹配，且使用JWST数据，与用户兴趣中的'jwst'相关。但论文聚焦于星系团强透镜和暗物质模型区分（ψDM vs CDM），而非用户核心关注的星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学或分子气体。用户核心作者均未出现。因此相关性中等，评分57对应三星。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 波状暗物质（ψDM）是一种难以捉摸的暗物质（DM）候选者。该模型通常也被称为模糊或超轻暗物质，提出暗物质是一种极轻（m∼10⁻²² eV）的玻色子，因此具有千秒差距尺度的德布罗意波长。因此，暗物质的干涉会产生亚星系尺度的密度涨落，这可以通过强引力透镜效应进行研究。在本文中，我们使用残余功率谱P_δ(k)作为探测ψDM的探针，该谱量化了从强透镜星系团中的多重成像星系测量到的、与平滑透镜预测的偏差。关键思想是，这些偏差中印刻着来自暗物质亚结构的透镜畸变，可以统计地加以利用，以区分不同的暗物质理论。我们模拟了JWST质量的星系团强引力透镜模拟观测，在ψDM和标准冷暗物质（CDM）范式内对视线方向的暗物质亚结构进行建模。通过使用模拟的深度观测（约20小时），我们发现P_δ(k)对ψDM粒子质量和涨落幅度都很敏感，并且能够区分ψDM涨落与CDM子暗晕。我们证明，通过使用局部弯曲弧基形式对平滑透镜进行建模，可以直接从数据中测量P_δ(k)。在考虑实际建模系统误差的情况下，我们在1 ≲ k ≲ 11 kpc⁻¹范围内发现了ψDM和CDM之间具有统计显著性的分离——这为探测暗物质的波状性质提供了一个独立于现有约束的探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，残余功率谱P_δ(k)可以作为探测波状暗物质波动性质的有效独立探针，补充现有约束。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Fiducial elliptical NFW cluster lens model parameters. The ellipticity components \(e_{1},e_{2}\) follow the lenstronomy reduced complex ellipticity convention, where \(|e|=(1-q)/(1+q)\) with \(q=b/a\) the projected axis ratio; \(e_{2}=0\) aligns the major axis with the \(x\) -axis. The scale radius \(r_{s}\) and normalization \(\alpha_{R_{s}}\) are derived from \(M_{200}\) and \(c_{200}\) via lenstronomy ’s LensCosmo module assuming Planck cosmology ( Planck Collaboration et al. 2020 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：基准椭圆NFW星系团透镜模型参数。椭圆率分量\(e_{1},e_{2}\)遵循lenstronomy的简化复椭圆率约定，其中\(|e|=(1-q)/(1+q)\)，\(q=b/a\)为投影轴比；\(e_{2}=0\)表示主轴与\(x\)轴对齐。尺度半径\(r_{s}\)和归一化参数\(\alpha_{R_{s}}\)由\(M_{200}\)和\(c_{200}\)通过lenstronomy的LensCosmo模块推导得出，假设采用普朗克宇宙学（Planck Collaboration et al. 2020）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Right: Source plane. The position of a randomly placed source galaxy, resulting in three image locations on the lens plane, is shown as a star. The black solid lines indicate caustic curves, and the shaded yellow region indicates the “safe" region 0.2 away from the caustic curves. Left: Magnification map on the image plane. The black solid lines show the critical curves, and the three white dots show the positions of the multiply-lensed source galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：右图：源平面。一颗随机放置的源星系的位置（在透镜平面上产生三个像点）以星形表示。黑色实线表示焦散曲线，黄色阴影区域表示距离焦散曲线0.2角秒的“安全”区域。左图：像平面上的放大率图。黑色实线表示临界曲线，三个白点表示多重成像的源星系的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Projected substructure convergence fields \(\Delta\kappa\) for a representative mock realization under three dark matter models. Columns (left to right): CDM, showing perturbations from subhalos with masses between \(10^{6}-10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) ; \(\psi\) DM Case 1 ( \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) , \(\log_{10}A_{\psi}=1.2\) ), showing high-amplitude density fluctuations on the \(\lambda_{{dB}}\) scale; and \(\psi\) DM Case 2 ( \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) , \(\log_{10}A_{\psi}=-0.8\) ), showing lower-amplitude fluctuations on a larger spatial scale, reflecting the longer \(\lambda_{{dB}}\) of the lighter boson. Top row : the continuous physical \(\Delta\kappa\) field, evaluated on a grid with a pixel scale \(8\times\) finer than JWST. Bottom row : the same field sampled on the JWST pixel grid ( \(100\times 100\) pixels at \(0.031^{\prime\prime}\,{pixel}^{-1}\) ) used for the mock observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三种暗物质模型下，一个代表性模拟实现的投影亚结构收敛场\(\Delta\kappa\)。列（从左到右）：CDM，显示质量在\(10^{6}-10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\)之间的子暗晕引起的扰动；ψDM情形1（\(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\)，\(\log_{10}A_{\psi}=1.2\)），显示在\(\lambda_{{dB}}\)尺度上的高振幅密度涨落；以及ψDM情形2（\(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\)，\(\log_{10}A_{\psi}=-0.8\)），显示在更大空间尺度上的较低振幅涨落，反映了更轻玻色子更长的\(\lambda_{{dB}}\)。顶行：连续的物理\(\Delta\kappa\)场，在像素尺度比JWST精细8倍的网格上评估。底行：在用于模拟观测的JWST像素网格（\(100\times 100\)像素，\(0.031^{\prime\prime}\,{pixel}^{-1}\)）上采样的同一场。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: NIRCam F150W observational and detector settings used in the JWST mock simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：JWST模拟模拟中使用的NIRCam F150W观测和探测器设置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Deviation maps \(\delta_{i}^{{th}}=(I^{{subs}}-I^{{smooth}})/\sigma\) for \(\psi\) DM at three boson masses \(\log_{10}(m_{\psi}/{eV})\in\{-21,\,-22,\,-23\}\) at the physical fluctuation amplitude \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=-0.8\) from Laroche et al. 2022 , for a representative source realization. Top row : smooth reference images. Subsequent row pairs : each pair shows, for one boson mass, the \(\psi\) DM mock image (top of the pair) and deviation map (bottom of the pair, with \(\pm 30\sigma\) , \(\pm 3\sigma\) and \(\pm 30\sigma\) color scales, respectively). At \(m_{\psi}=10^{-21}\,{eV}\) , \(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.008\,{kpc}\) is sub-pixel at cluster virial velocities. Fluctuations are unresolved, and residuals are dominated by the CDM-like subhalo population. At \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) , subhalos are strongly suppressed, but \(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.08\,{kpc}\) remains sub-pixel and the fluctuation amplitude is small, leaving only faint structure. At \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) , \(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.78\,{kpc}\) ( \({\sim}5\) pixels) is resolved, and the granules produce the coherent, large-scale alternating residuals visible in the bottom row pair.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于来自Laroche et al. 2022的物理涨落幅度\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=-0.8\)下，三种玻色子质量\(\log_{10}(m_{\psi}/{eV})\in\{-21,\,-22,\,-23\}\)的ψDM的偏差图\(\delta_{i}^{{th}}=(I^{{subs}}-I^{{smooth}})/\sigma\)，针对一个代表性源实现。顶行：平滑参考图像。后续行对：每对显示一种玻色子质量的ψDM模拟图像（对的上图）和偏差图（对的下图，分别使用\(\pm 30\sigma\)、\(\pm 3\sigma\)和\(\pm 30\sigma\)色标）。在\(m_{\psi}=10^{-21}\,{eV}\)时，\(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.008\,{kpc}\)在星系团维里速度下是亚像素的。涨落未被分辨，残差由类似CDM的子暗晕群体主导。在\(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\)时，子暗晕被强烈抑制，但\(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.08\,{kpc}\)仍然是亚像素的，且涨落幅度很小，仅留下微弱的结构。在\(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\)时，\(\lambda_{{dB}}\approx 0.78\,{kpc}\)（约5个像素）被分辨，颗粒产生了在底行对中可见的、连贯的大尺度交替残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Deviation maps \(\delta_{i}^{{th}}=(I^{{subs}}-I^{{smooth}})/\sigma\) for \(\psi\) DM with fixed \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) at three fluctuation amplitudes \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})\in\{0.2,\,0.7,\,1.2\}\) , for a representative source realization. Top row : smooth reference images. Subsequent row pairs : each pair shows, for one fluctuation amplitude, the \(\psi\) DM mock image (top of the pair) and its deviation map (bottom of row pair) with \(\pm 3\sigma\) , \(\pm 5\sigma\) , and \(\pm 7\sigma\) color scales, respectively for increasing \(A_{\psi}\) . At \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=0.2\) , the deviation maps are barely distinguishable from noise, suppressing residual structure even relative to CDM prediction. At \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=0.7\) , stronger structure begins to emerge in the deviation maps. At \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=1.2\) , the density fluctuations produce pronounced, spatially extended patches of alternating positive and negative signal, demonstrating that the detectability of \(\psi\) DM with \(P_{\delta}(k)\) grows strongly with the fluctuation amplitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对于固定\(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\)、三种涨落幅度\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})\in\{0.2,\,0.7,\,1.2\}\)的ψDM的偏差图\(\delta_{i}^{{th}}=(I^{{subs}}-I^{{smooth}})/\sigma\)，针对一个代表性源实现。顶行：平滑参考图像。后续行对：每对显示一种涨落幅度的ψDM模拟图像（对的上图）及其偏差图（行对的下图），分别使用\(\pm 3\sigma\)、\(\pm 5\sigma\)和\(\pm 7\sigma\)色标（对应递增的\(A_{\psi}\)）。在\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=0.2\)时，偏差图几乎无法与噪声区分，甚至相对于CDM预测也抑制了残余结构。在\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=0.7\)时，偏差图中开始出现更强的结构。在\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=1.2\)时，密度涨落产生了明显的、空间延伸的正负交替信号斑块，表明用\(P_{\delta}(k)\)探测ψDM的能力随涨落幅度显著增强。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Theoretical residual power spectra \(P_{\delta}^{{th}}(k)\) for CDM and \(\psi\) DM with fixed boson mass \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) at five fluctuation amplitudes \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})\in\{-0.8,\,-0.3,\,0.2,\,0.7,\,1.2\}\) , computed from 60 deviation maps (20 source realizations \(\times\) 3 images) per model. Solid lines show the median; shaded bands the 16th–84th percentile interval. All spectra decline steeply with \(k\) , and CDM and \(\psi\) DM differ in their slope of \(P_{\delta}(k)\) at scales \(k\lesssim 3\,{kpc}^{-1}\) . With \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=1.2\) , \(\psi\) DM produces a broadband elevation above the CDM baseline that is clearly distinguishable for \(k\gtrsim 3\,{kpc}^{-1}\) . Lower fluctuation amplitudes lead to a drop in power below the prediction of CDM.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：CDM和固定玻色子质量\(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\)、五种涨落幅度\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})\in\{-0.8,\,-0.3,\,0.2,\,0.7,\,1.2\}\)的ψDM的理论残余功率谱\(P_{\delta}^{{th}}(k)\)，每个模型由60张偏差图（20个源实现×3个像）计算得出。实线表示中位数；阴影带表示第16至第84百分位区间。所有谱随\(k\)急剧下降，CDM和ψDM在\(k\lesssim 3\,{kpc}^{-1}\)尺度上的\(P_{\delta}(k)\)斜率不同。当\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=1.2\)时，ψDM在CDM基线之上产生宽带抬升，在\(k\gtrsim 3\,{kpc}^{-1}\)范围内清晰可辨。较低的涨落幅度导致功率降至CDM预测以下。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Theoretical residual power spectra \(P_{\delta}^{{th}}(k)\) for CDM and \(\psi\) DM at three boson masses \(\log_{10}(m_{\psi}/{eV})\in\{-23,-22,-21\}\) , with the fluctuation amplitude set to the physical prediction \(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=-0.8\) from Laroche et al. 2022 . Solid lines show the median over 60 deviation maps per model; shaded bands show the 16th–84th percentile interval. At the physical amplitude, \(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\) shows a clear excess above CDM at all scales, \(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\) shows less power than CDM at \(k\lesssim 10\) kpc -1 , and \(m_{\psi}=10^{-21}\,{eV}\) is indistinguishable from CDM.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：CDM和三种玻色子质量\(\log_{10}(m_{\psi}/{eV})\in\{-23,-22,-21\}\)的ψDM的理论残余功率谱\(P_{\delta}^{{th}}(k)\)，涨落幅度设置为来自Laroche et al. 2022的物理预测值\(\log_{10}(A_{\psi})=-0.8\)。实线表示每个模型60张偏差图的中位数；阴影带表示第16至第84百分位区间。在物理幅度下，\(m_{\psi}=10^{-23}\,{eV}\)在所有尺度上显示出相对于CDM的明显超出，\(m_{\psi}=10^{-22}\,{eV}\)在\(k\lesssim 10\) kpc⁻¹处功率低于CDM，而\(m_{\psi}=10^{-21}\,{eV}\)与CDM无法区分。

title: Multi-Scale Magnetic Field Observations Reveal how Colliding Flows Trigger Star Formation
comment: Accepted for publication in ApJ; 23 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables; includes ancillary movies
summary: Magnetic fields play a crucial yet complex role in star formation, while their connection between large-scale filamentary clouds and small-scale young stellar objects remains poorly understood. We present new continuum polarization observations from the JCMT, ACA, and ALMA that provide continuous magnetic field measurements from approximately 5 pc down to approximately 4000 au, tracing for the first time the evolution of field morphology seamlessly across all key scales within a massive star-forming system. Our polarization maps reveal multiple U-shaped magnetic field structures pointing toward the central protocluster, aligned with accreting filaments from parsec to subparsec scales and converging at the compact center. This morphology suggests an environment of colliding flows that drag magnetic fields and trigger massive protocluster formation. On approximately 4000 au scales, we identify compact U-shaped fields likely guiding the kinematics of streamers accreting onto dense cores. The increasing curvature of these U-shaped patterns is a direct measure of a growing magnetic field tension force, implying a magnetic field strength scaling index of 0.50 +/- 0.10. These results indicate that the field, possibly enhanced by large-scale flow collisions, becomes strong enough to regulate star formation, linking parsec-scale colliding flows, a subparsec hub-filament system, and the triggering of massive star formation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过JCMT、ACA和ALMA的连续偏振观测，首次在大质量恒星形成系统中从约5秒差距到约4000天文单位尺度上无缝追踪磁场形态演化，揭示了U形磁场结构指向中心原星团，并与吸积纤维对齐，表明碰撞流拖拽磁场触发大质量原星团形成，磁场强度标度指数为0.50±0.10，表明磁场增强到足以调控恒星形成。
AI.motivation: 磁场在恒星形成中起关键但复杂的作用，大尺度纤维云与小尺度年轻恒星之间的磁场联系尚不清楚，缺乏跨尺度的连续磁场测量。
AI.method: 利用JCMT、ACA和ALMA进行连续谱偏振观测，从约5秒差距到约4000天文单位尺度上测量磁场，分析磁场形态的演化。
AI.result: 发现了多个U形磁场结构指向中心原星团，与吸积纤维对齐，紧凑U形场可能引导流吸积到致密核上，磁场强度标度指数为0.50±0.10。
AI.conclusion: 大尺度碰撞流增强磁场，使其强到足以调控恒星形成，连接了秒差距尺度的碰撞流、亚秒差距尺度的轮毂-纤维系统以及大质量恒星形成的触发过程。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于恒星形成中的磁场观测，与用户Zotero资料库中的'magnetic'、'polarization'等关键词部分匹配，但用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和多相气体，而本文研究的是银河系内大质量恒星形成区的磁场，属于恒星物理范畴，与用户主要领域关联较弱。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配，用户资料库包含'magnetic'和'polarization'，但本文主题为恒星形成磁场，非用户核心的强透镜或高红移星系研究。
recommendation.method_fit: 中等，使用了ALMA等望远镜的偏振观测，但方法应用于恒星形成而非引力透镜或高红移星系。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配，作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 较高，首次跨尺度追踪磁场形态演化，但创新点不在用户主要兴趣领域。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文属于恒星物理，用户明确要求降权此类研究；且未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体等核心主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场在恒星形成中扮演着关键而复杂的角色，但其在大尺度纤维状云与小型年轻恒星天体之间的关联仍知之甚少。我们展示了来自JCMT、ACA和ALMA的新连续偏振观测，这些观测提供了从约5秒差距到约4000天文单位的连续磁场测量，首次无缝追踪了一个大质量恒星形成系统中所有关键尺度上的磁场形态演化。我们的偏振图揭示了多个指向中心原星团的U形磁场结构，这些结构与从秒差距到亚秒差距尺度的吸积纤维对齐，并汇聚于致密中心。这种形态表明存在碰撞流环境，拖曳磁场并触发大质量原星团形成。在约4000天文单位尺度上，我们识别出紧凑的U形场，可能引导着吸积到致密核上的流束的运动学。这些U形图案曲率的增加直接反映了磁场张力力的增长，暗示磁场强度标度指数为0.50 ± 0.10。这些结果表明，可能由大尺度流碰撞增强的磁场变得足够强以调控恒星形成，将秒差距尺度的碰撞流、亚秒差距尺度的轮毂-纤维系统以及大质量恒星形成的触发联系起来。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，大尺度碰撞流增强磁场，使其强到足以调控恒星形成，连接了秒差距尺度的碰撞流、亚秒差距尺度的轮毂-纤维系统以及大质量恒星形成的触发过程。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Datasets.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：数据集。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Multi-scale magnetic field maps of G33.92+0.11. (a) JCMT polarization segments (magenta) overlaid on the JCMT 850 \(\mu\) m continuum image, showing a converging magnetic fields (white arrows) and a U-shape morphology in the Northeast (white curve). (b) ALMA ACA polarization segments (yellow) overlaid on the ACA 1.3 mm continuum image, showing three U-shape magnetic fields (white curves). (c) ALMA 12-m array polarization segments (cyan) overlaid on the 12-m array 1.3 mm continuum image. All magnetic field segments are rotated by 90 ∘ from the originally detected polarization orientations. Additionally shown are the dense cores identified in Suárez et al. ( 2021 ) with green crosses. The different telescope resolutions are displayed with the blue ellipses in the lower left corners.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：G33.92+0.11的多尺度磁场图。(a) JCMT偏振段（品红色）叠加在JCMT 850 \(\mu\) m连续图像上，显示汇聚的磁场（白色箭头）和东北方向的U形形态（白色曲线）。(b) ALMA ACA偏振段（黄色）叠加在ACA 1.3 mm连续图像上，显示三个U形磁场（白色曲线）。(c) ALMA 12米阵列偏振段（青色）叠加在12米阵列1.3 mm连续图像上。所有磁场段均从原始检测到的偏振方向旋转了90°。此外，还显示了Suárez等人（2021）识别的致密核，用绿色十字标记。不同望远镜的分辨率用左下角的蓝色椭圆显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Magnetic field curvature ( \(\kappa\) ) estimated from (a) JCMT, (b) ALMA ACA, and (c) ALMA 12-m polarization data, with green crosses marking dense cores. To highlight regions with significant curvature, a 3 \(\sigma_{curve}\) mask (0.0045, 0.024, and 0.165 arcsec -1 for the JCMT, ACA, and 12-m data, respectively) is applied. The white curves mark the locations of the apparent U-shaped magnetic fields (as shown in Figure 1 ) and coincide with regions of relatively high curvature. The green crosses label the dense cores identified in Suárez et al. ( 2021 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从(a) JCMT、(b) ALMA ACA和(c) ALMA 12米偏振数据估计的磁场曲率（\(\kappa\)），绿色十字标记致密核。为了突出具有显著曲率的区域，应用了3 \(\sigma_{curve}\)掩模（JCMT、ACA和12米数据分别为0.0045、0.024和0.165 arcsec^{-1}）。白色曲线标记了明显的U形磁场位置（如图1所示），并与曲率相对较高的区域重合。绿色十字标记了Suárez等人（2021）识别的致密核。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Variation of magnetic field curvature ( \(\kappa\) ) over multiple scales towards individual cores: large scale (pc-scale converging filaments) – intermediate scale (subparsec-scale colliding filaments) – small scale (envelope-scale with flows and compressed layers). \(\kappa\) in most of the cores shows an order of magnitude increase from parsec- to subparsec-scale, and from subparsec- to envelope-scale.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：朝向单个核的多尺度上磁场曲率（\(\kappa\)）的变化：大尺度（秒差距尺度汇聚纤维）– 中间尺度（亚秒差距尺度碰撞纤维）– 小尺度（包层尺度，带有流和压缩层）。大多数核中的\(\kappa\)从秒差距到亚秒差距尺度以及从亚秒差距到包层尺度增加了一个数量级。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Filaments identified at parsec (cyan) and subparsec (blue) scale, overlaid on the (a) ACA C 18 O integrated intensity map and (b) the JVLA NH 3 integrated intensity map.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在秒差距（青色）和亚秒差距（蓝色）尺度上识别的纤维，叠加在(a) ACA C^{18}O积分强度图和(b) JVLA NH_{3}积分强度图上。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: (a) Filaments identified at subparsec (blue) and envelope-scale (green), overlaid on the (a) ALMA band 6 continuum and (b) the ALMA \({}^{13}CS\) integrated intensity map.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：(a) 在亚秒差距（蓝色）和包层尺度（绿色）上识别的纤维，叠加在(a) ALMA波段6连续图和(b) ALMA ^{13}CS积分强度图上。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Local relative orientation between the magnetic field and subparsec-scale filaments. (a) Relative orientations are indicated by the color-coded circles overlaid on the ACA continuum map. (b) Histogram of relative orientations across the map. Two distinct alignment modes (parallel-like and perpendicular-like) are identified in the NE–SW and NW–SE filaments.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：磁场与亚秒差距尺度纤维之间的局部相对取向。(a) 相对取向由叠加在ACA连续图上的彩色圆圈表示。(b) 整个图中相对取向的直方图。在NE–SW和NW–SE纤维中识别出两种不同的对齐模式（平行类和垂直类）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Local relative orientation between the magnetic field and envelope-scale filaments. (a) Relative orientations are indicated by color-coded circles overlaid on the 12-m continuum map. (b) Histogram of relative orientations across the region. Most filaments exhibit a predominantly parallel-like alignment, although perpendicular-like orientations are still present in localized areas.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：磁场与包层尺度纤维之间的局部相对取向。(a) 相对取向由叠加在12米连续图上的彩色圆圈表示。(b) 整个区域中相对取向的直方图。大多数纤维表现出主要的平行类对齐，尽管在局部区域仍存在垂直类取向。
